mapper.sql: id, name, home_url, search_url, search_data_path, search_title_field, search_url_field, search_cover_field, episode_pattern, episode_group, episode_selector, encoding, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_source (name, home_url, search_url, search_data_path, search_title_field, search_url_field, search_cover_field, episode_pattern, episode_group, episode_selector, encoding, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{homeUrl}, #{searchUrl}, #{searchDataPath}, #{searchTitleField}, #{searchUrlField}, #{searchCoverField}, #{episodePattern}, #{episodeGroup}, #{episodeSelector}, #{encoding}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM video_source ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE video_source SET name = #{name}, home_url = #{homeUrl}, search_url = #{searchUrl}, search_data_path = #{searchDataPath}, search_title_field = #{searchTitleField}, search_url_field = #{searchUrlField}, search_cover_field = #{searchCoverField}, episode_pattern = #{episodePattern}, episode_group = #{episodeGroup}, episode_selector = #{episodeSelector}, encoding = #{encoding}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO video_source (name, home_url, search_url, search_data_path, search_title_field, search_url_field, search_cover_field, episode_pattern, episode_group, episode_selector, encoding, sort_order) VALUES
(#{s.name}, #{s.homeUrl}, #{s.searchUrl}, #{s.searchDataPath}, #{s.searchTitleField}, #{s.searchUrlField}, #{s.searchCoverField}, #{s.episodePattern}, #{s.episodeGroup}, #{s.episodeSelector}, #{s.encoding}, #{s.sortOrder})
